import { motion } from 'framer-motion' import { WelcomeBanner } from '../components/dashboard/welcome-banner' import { StatsSection } from '../components/dashboard/stats-card' import { AnalyticsSection } from '../components/dashboard/analytics-charts' import { SmartSuggestions, ImpactSection } from '../components/dashboard/smart-suggestions' import { ActivityFeed, NGORequestsPanel } from '../components/dashboard/activity-feed' export default function DonorDashboard() { return (
{/* Premium Food Hero Section */}
Colorful Impact, Real Change Join thousands rescuing food and feeding communities. Every meal saved is a life touched.
{/* Welcome Banner */}
{/* Stats Section */}
{/* Analytics Charts */}

Impact Analytics

{/* Smart Suggestions */}
{/* Activity & Requests Section */}
{/* Impact Section */}
) }
